title: Ship AI governance acquisition surfaces and quarterly-review content
summary: Records release evidence for the new AI-governance landing page, the governance-focused generic dashboard comparison page, and the quarterly-review blog that ties release history, customer usage, and role boundaries into governance decisions.
completed_todo_items: Ship 2 practical blog posts every sprint
Keep release-history generation tied to release evidence for meaningful public launches

smoke_or_visibility.notes: Confirms the new AI-governance landing page, governance comparison page, homepage discovery links, and quarterly-review blog route all render from the production build and remain in the public release-history pipeline.
Confirms the AI-governance acquisition batch is represented in release evidence so announcements and changelog generation stay current.

ops.rollback_plan: Revert the AI-governance landing page, governance comparison entry, quarterly-review blog content, and release-evidence manifest in tokvera-dashboard and tokvera if the positioning or SEO direction needs to change.
